text: Imaging Centres In Mumbai | Emergency MRI In Mumbai| iscanimaging Contact No. : +91-22-66346363/6464/6565 Home about us Diagnostic Tests 3Tesla mri 194 slice Cardiac Ct Teleradiology / Second opinion Brochure MRI CT scan Patient info Blog contact us Welcome to iScan Imaging Center Mumbai's First 3 Tesla MRI-Magnetom Spectra 8am to 8pm Monday-Saturday & 9am to 1pm Sunday 24*7 CT & MRI Emergency services Ambulance Services Urgent Report within 24 hrs iScan Imaging Centre is an ultramodern Diagnostic and Imaging Medical Centre located in the heart of Mumbai, at Kemps Corner. Dr Anand Gupta and Dr Devang Desai, two Radiologists, who have special expertise and exhaustive in-depth experience in MRI and CT, helm it. They bring in a combined experience of more than 20 years of clinical practice.
